title: CI failure: missing 'requests' module
snippet: Previous incident resolved by adding 'requests' to requirements.txt. Root cause: new code imported requests but dependency was not declared.

title: CI failure: environment variable not set
snippet: Deploy failed because DATABASE_URL was not configured in CI environment. Fixed by adding the variable to GitHub Actions secrets.

title: CI failure: permission denied on deploy script
snippet: Deploy script lacked execute permission. Fixed with chmod +x deploy.sh and committed the permission change.

title: Deploy to staging failed: permission denied on deploy.sh
fix_summary: Update the permissions of the deploy.sh script to ensure it is executable by the deployment user.
